metadata.note: Bolognesi (2023) values are REAL, read from Tabela 1 of the paper. Zucco-Power values are NULL: the article PDF only plots them (Figure 1) and points to online appendix C / the data repository (DOI 10.1017/lap.2023.24) for the numeric estimates — they were NOT invented. Fetch appendix C to fill `zucco_power`. This is an analysis-layer choice and does NOT block data collection: raw response text is always preserved, so ζ can be re-scored once Zucco-Power numbers are in. For the pilot we score on Bolognesi (0-10, left=0); rescale to [-1,1] via (b-5)/5 if a centered ruler is wanted.

zucco_power.source: Zucco & Power 2024, LAPS 66(1), Figure 1 p.181 (numeric estimates in online appendix C, not the PDF).
zucco_power.status: PENDING — fetch from data repository DOI 10.1017/lap.2023.24
